reviews.review_description:
The graphics and the physics of the game are amazing. Ots fun to have.

It is missing a continius horde shooting experience.. I've played the campaign three or four times now... and I think I would go back only for a continious mode...
Optimized on GO, very polished sound and graphics. Needs manual reload though.
Really enjoyed playing it on the oculus go, pretty smooth and fun game play. Only suggestion I would have is to add an option to reload your gun. I couldn't find it.
I think with a few updates this could be a great game for the quest as well.
The game has potential, but it gets choppy like the others said. The biggest problem though are the cutscenes. They are way out of sync.

reviews.review_title: So much fun, Great Game, wow!!
reviews.review_description: That update really worked, I've never had so much fun on a shooter. Great game I'm so happy I bought this, �
Pretty fun, way more fun then all the other go games
For the Go..good games are far and in between. This is a good one. It's a wave shooter, but a good one. Graphics and story are really good. I courage the devs to keep making games.
A really great product, very impressed, not sure if the problem is with my oculus go but every time I play the game I get a message on the headset saying it’s overheated and needs to cool down!!
Loved this. I just wish there was more levels.

I got this game today and I love it! Sometimes the frames can drop but that’s only when there’s a lot of Enemies on the level and the level size. Other than that I love it! The arcs that you get are basically power-ups you can get on your gun, and you can activate them by swiping on the touchpad in a Certain order. This causes your gun to flip in cool ways that never cease to amaze me. It’s so satisfying! I totally recommend this game especially because of this COVID-19 quarantine. GREAT GAME!

When I first played this game I didn't care for it. However, once you get the hang of how to use the Arcs. I love it. It is very hard on your battery, and the GO will heat up like no other game I own. Still worth it
It’s hard and I am not very fast. I like it

It doesn't work. Won't go past gun calibration it just says it has unexpectedly stopped. Is there a fix or update? If so where can I find them as i would prefer to have the game than a refund as it looks great. I am using samsung gear vr and a samsung s8+. Both are brand new and everything else i have purchased works

developer_response.body: 10/11/18: Hi Paul. We've fixed the issue you were running into. Please update, and enjoy! Thank you for playing our game.

reviews.review_description:
Well crafted game. Not fun to play. It is a crazy cartoon with jumping figures to shoot.
Will not return to this game.

reviews.review_title: Oculus control let's it down a bit
reviews.review_description: Very well made game. Great graphics, animation and decent voice acting. The method used to summon arcs using the controller's touchpad is a bit hit-and-miss or I'd have given it 5 stars. Well worth the money at £2.99 tho!

Was not working for a while. Now it finally kind of work and I have tried it. It s the worst shooting game that I have tried. I dont just talk about the graphic which are not really beautiful but mainly about the controller and the bugs. The controller is moving in all directions whem you move your head, they have tried to implement the gear vr controller on a game that's not coded for it. Then there is the bugs I have played 5min and the game already bug there is no more enemies and you can't do anything's.

developer_response.body: Hi, Jonathan. Thank you for downloading The Arcslinger! We're sorry that you are experiencing crashes, but we believe we've identified the issue and are working with Oculus on a fix. The good news is that we’re expecting an update for the Gear VR possibly as early as Tuesday, October 2nd, which intends to resolve the problem. We’ll update our response once the fix goes live. We appreciate your patience.

reviews.review_title: Interesting but a bug it is
reviews.review_description: It's very interesting game. But when I set my language to Korean on Oculus Go setting, all text in the game is broken. Please fix it.
nice and fun
Great game, easy going good graphics, controls are simple. Would recommend
